prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns, ICE (Intercontinental Exchange) exhibits moderate daily volatility around 1-2%. Over 6 days, assuming random walk with slight upward drift typical of financial stocks, the prediction incorporates historical volatility of ~15-20% annually. The point estimate assumes minimal drift, while confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty over the 6-day horizon using standard deviation scaling by sqrt(6).
